title: AbandonPenaltyRecord
description: One row of `state.profile.abandonHistory` (ring buffer, capped at 64 entries). Records a quorum-attested disconnect or forced-leave per `docs/architecture/abandon-penalty.md`. Persisted in IndexedDB `hr-profile.abandonHistory` per `docs/architecture/data-inventory.md`; wiped by `WIPE_LOCAL_DATA scope=profile|all`. Quorum requires at least one peer witness AND the signaling server's connection-close attestation; envelope signing is enforced by `signaling-envelope.schema.json`.

peerId.description: PeerId the penalty is recorded against.

observedAt.description: Wall-clock at which the recording peer first observed the disconnect (heartbeat-loss start, forced-leave click, or 120 s reconnect-grace expiry).

kind.description: heartbeat-loss = both witnesses corroborate; forced-leave = peer voluntarily left mid-match; verified-disconnect = 120 s reconnect-grace elapsed without successful continuity-challenge round-trip.

items.description: Either a peer UUID or the literal `signaling-server` token; quorum requires at least one of each before consumption.

penaltyTier.description: Tier applied to the abandoning peer's local trust record; decay rule per `abandon-penalty.md` § 4.
